steps.t: Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
The Jewel of Amad can be found in Câr Bronach. You should locate the Jewel of Amad.
Olcrith can be found in Câr Bronach. You should defeat Olcrith to get the Jewel of Amad.
The Jewel of Amad can be found in Câr Bronach. You should retrieve the Jewel of Amad.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should add the Jewel of Amad to the Throne of Zidir-nesad under Rísti Graver'…
Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
